name: RoboForex
description_short: RoboForex is a multi-asset broker offering forex, stocks, crypto, and indices trading via MT4, MT5, cTrader, and proprietary R StocksTrader with a $10 minimum deposit.
description_long:
RoboForex is an international online broker founded in 2009, offering access to over 12,000 instruments across forex, stocks, indices, commodities, ETFs, and cryptocurrencies. The broker is widely recognized for its extremely low entry barrier, with a minimum deposit of just $10 on most account types, making it accessible to traders at every experience level. Multiple platform options include the industry-standard MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5, cTrader, and the proprietary R StocksTrader platform purpose-built for equity and ETF trading.

One of RoboForex's standout offerings is its CopyFX copy trading platform, which allows traders to automatically replicate the strategies of experienced signal providers. This social trading feature appeals to beginners who want to participate in markets without building their own strategies from scratch. The broker also supports algorithmic and automated trading through Expert Advisors on MT4/MT5 and provides VPS hosting for uninterrupted automated execution.

RoboForex offers several account types to suit different trading styles. Pro and ProCent accounts feature no commissions with spreads from 1.3 pips, while ECN and Prime accounts deliver raw spreads from 0 pips with a $4 per lot commission — ideal for scalpers and high-frequency traders. Leverage reaches up to 1:2000 on select account types, varying by region and instrument class. The R StocksTrader account opens access to real stock ownership and fractional shares with a $100 minimum deposit.

The broker is regulated by the International Financial Services Commission (IFSC) in Belize and the Financial Services Commission (FSC) in Mauritius. While these are not top-tier regulatory bodies compared to the FCA or ASIC, RoboForex has maintained a consistent operational record since its founding. It provides 24/7 multilingual customer support, an educational portal with webinars and video tutorials, economic calendars, and daily market analysis to support traders at every level.
pros: Extremely low $10 minimum deposit on most account types
Multiple platforms including MT4, MT5, cTrader, and proprietary R StocksTrader
CopyFX copy trading platform for passive strategy replication
ECN accounts with raw spreads from 0 pips and competitive $4/lot commission
Broad instrument selection covering 12,000+ tradable assets
cons: Regulated by IFSC Belize and FSC Mauritius rather than top-tier regulators
Customer support quality can be inconsistent
Inactivity fees may apply on dormant accounts
best_for: Beginner traders with limited starting capital
Forex scalpers seeking raw ECN spreads
Copy traders using CopyFX signal providers
Stock traders wanting access to global equities
meta_description: RoboForex is a multi-asset broker offering forex, stocks, crypto, and indices trading via MT4, MT5, cTrader, and proprietary R StocksTrader with a $10.
